Profile
About Me

I'm a creative graphic designer based in Dubai, UAE, with over a decade of hands-on experience turning ideas into compelling visual language. From concept to production, I specialise in print design, brand identity, packaging, and digital graphics.

Currently working as Graphic Designer & Production Manager at Golden Future Advertising, Dubai. My work spans flyers, posters, sticker designs, die cuts, box designs, and large-format output for clients across the Middle East.

I thrive in fast-paced environments where consistency, creativity, and deadlines all matter equally. Fluent in English, Bangla, and Hindi.
